input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.8.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.8.3
            TITLE: the laminate, brackets, backing plates and inserts must have sufficient stiffness, shear area,

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.8.3: The laminate, brackets, backing plates and inserts must have sufficient stiffness, shear area,
F.7.8.3 The laminate, brackets, backing plates and inserts must have sufficient stiffness, shear area, 
bearing area, weld area and strength to carry the load specified in F.7.8.1 in any direction.   
Data obtained from the laminate perimeter shear strength test (F.4.3.5) must prove sufficient 
shear area is provided.

final_answer: The laminate, brackets, backing plates and inserts must have sufficient stiffness, shear area, bearing area, weld area and strength to carry the load specified in F.7.8.1 in any direction. Data obtained from the laminate perimeter shear strength test (F.4.3.5) must prove sufficient shear area is provided.
